content: 针对行业龙头公司，查询2022-2025年第三季度的营业总收入

tools_used.result:
财报数据库包含以下表：

## _share_capital_cache
字段数: 3
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - report_period (TEXT)
  - share_capital (REAL)

## balance_sheet
字段数: 21
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - asset_cash_and_cash_equivalents (REAL)
  - asset_accounts_receivable (REAL)
  - asset_inventory (REAL)
  - asset_trading_financial_assets (REAL)
  - asset_construction_in_progress (REAL)
  - asset_total_assets (REAL)
  - asset_total_assets_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - liability_accounts_payable (REAL)
  - liability_advance_from_customers (REAL)
  - liability_total_liabilities (REAL)
  - liability_total_liabilities_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - liability_contract_liabilities (REAL)
  ...及其他 6 个字段

## cash_flow_sheet
字段数: 18
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - net_cash_flow (REAL)
  - net_cash_flow_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  - operating_cf_ratio_of_net_cf (REAL)
  - operating_cf_cash_from_sales (REAL)
  - investing_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  - investing_cf_ratio_of_net_cf (REAL)
  - investing_cf_cash_for_investments (REAL)
  - investing_cf_cash_from_investment_recovery (REAL)
  - financing_cf_cash_from_borrowing (REAL)
  - financing_cf_cash_for_debt_repayment (REAL)
  - financing_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  ...及其他 3 个字段

## core_performance_indicators_sheet
字段数: 20
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - eps (REAL)
  - total_operating_revenue (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_qoq_growth (REAL)
  - net_profit_10k_yuan (REAL)
  - net_profit_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - net_profit_qoq_growth (REAL)
  - net_asset_per_share (REAL)
  - roe (REAL)
  - operating_cf_per_share (REAL)
  - net_profit_excl_non_recurring (REAL)
  - net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy (REAL)
  ...及其他 5 个字段

## income_sheet
字段数: 21
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - net_profit (REAL)
  - net_profit_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - other_income (REAL)
  - total_operating_revenue (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_expense_cost_of_sales (REAL)
  - operating_expense_selling_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_administrative_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_financial_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_rnd_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges (REAL)
  - total_operating_expenses (REAL)
  ...及其他 6 个字段

tools_used.args: {"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT stock_abbr, stock_code FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet ORDER BY stock_abbr LIMIT 20"}
{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT report_period FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet ORDER BY report_period DESC LIMIT 30"}

{"sql": "SELECT 
  stock_abbr,
  stock_code,
  report_period,
  total_operating_revenue
FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet
WHERE report_period IN ('2023Q3', '2024Q3', '2025Q3')
  AND total_operating_revenue IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY report_period DESC, total_operating_revenue DESC"}
{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT report_period FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet WHERE report_period LIKE '2022%' ORDER BY report_period"}

{"sql": "SELECT 
  stock_abbr,
  stock_code,
  MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2023Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS '2023Q3营业收入',
  MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2024Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS '2024Q3营业收入',
  MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS '2025Q3营业收入'
FROM core_performance_indicators_sheet
WHERE report_period IN ('2023Q3', '2024Q3', '2025Q3')
  AND total_operating_revenue IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY stock_abbr, stock_code
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) DESC
LIMIT 10"}
